title: Heaven, Hell, and Resurrection: Where Are We Going?
notebook_title: Beyond the Waiting Room: The Biblical Hope of Resurrection

entries.notebooklm_title: Heaven is just the waiting room
entries.customize_prompt: Comprehensive deep dive covering every section of the handout. Don't rush — spend significant time on the contested theological points: the apantesin rapture analysis, the three views on hell (eternal conscious torment, annihilationism, eternal separation), the Six Distinctions in "Glorified, Not Deified", the prepared-vessel argument from Hebrews 10:5, the tabernacle/temple imagery in 2 Corinthians 5, and the Phil 3:21 power-clause connection to Romans 8:11. Walk through the major biblical passages slowly. Audience: thoughtful Christians from mixed Baptist/Pentecostal backgrounds, no formal seminary training. Two-host conversational format.

entries.notebooklm_title: Heaven is Not Your Final Destination
